name: Peach Pecan Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the peaches and reserve 1/4 cup of the syrup. Chop 1 cup of the peach slices.
2. In a blender container, combine the remaining peaches, melted margarine, eggs, reserved peach syrup, and lemon juice. Blend until very smooth.
3. Stir together all dry ingredients in a mixer bowl. Add the egg mixture, folding it in until the dry mixture is just moistened.
4. Fold in the reserved peaches and nuts.
5. Bake at 350°F for 20 to 25 minutes or until done. Cool in the muffin tin for 10 minutes, then remove them to a rack to cool.
6. Spread tops with peach preserves.
